info.title: Scavio Search API
info.description: Real-time structured search over Google, YouTube, Amazon, Walmart, Reddit, TikTok, and Instagram.

Bearer.description: Your Scavio API key, sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <key>'.

post.description: Perform a Google search and get structured results.

light_request.description: Set to false for full results (2 credits). Omit for light mode (1 credit).

post.description: Search YouTube and get structured results.
Get metadata for a YouTube video.
Search Amazon products and get structured results.

domain.description: Amazon domain suffix. Defaults to com (United States).

post.description: Get details for an Amazon product by ASIN.

domain.description: Amazon domain suffix. Defaults to com (United States).

post.description: Search Walmart products and get structured results.
Get details for a Walmart product by product ID.
Search Reddit posts and get structured results.
Fetch a Reddit post's metadata plus its comment thread (flat list with depth).

url.description: Full Reddit post URL (e.g. returned by /reddit/search).

post.description: Get a TikTok user profile by username or sec_user_id.
Get a TikTok user's video list.
Get detailed data for a single TikTok video.
Get comments for a TikTok video.
Get replies to a specific comment.
Search TikTok videos by keyword with optional filters.

publish_time.description: 0 = all time, 1 = last day, 7 = week, 30 = month, 90 = 3 months, 180 = 6 months

post.description: Search TikTok users by keyword.
Get details and stats for a TikTok hashtag.
Get videos for a specific hashtag.
Get a TikTok user's follower list.
Get a TikTok user's following list.
Get an Instagram user profile by username or user_id.
Get an Instagram user's posts (timeline media).

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response

post.description: Get posts an Instagram user is tagged in.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response

post.description: Get an Instagram user's active stories.
Get a single Instagram post by url, media_id, or shortcode.
Get comments for an Instagram post.

post.description: Get replies to a specific Instagram comment.

post.description: Search Instagram users by keyword.

cursor.description: Rank token from a previous response

get.description: Returns your current plan, usage count, and remaining searches.
